title: Sheldon vex Plankton
description: Turns the vex into Plankton with a jet pack
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)

Plankton has had enough. For many years, he has tried to steal the Krabby Patty formula but failed. And now, he decides to grab a sword and take on everyone who gets in his way.

(replaces the model and texture of the vex)
